trans-unit.source: TagCheck | GTM Validation & Audit Tool for Digital Marketers
trans-unit.target: Tag Build | 為 GA4 團隊打造的快速 GTM JSON 建構器

trans-unit.source: Validate your GTM setup with TagCheck and keep marketing measurement accurate, reviewable, and easier to hand off.
trans-unit.target: 使用靜態、多語系的工作流程，為 GA4 事件建立可直接交給 Google Tag Manager 的 JSON，專為 SEO 專家與行銷團隊設計。
關於 Tag Build | GA4 標籤工作流程

trans-unit.source: Learn how TagCheck helps digital teams audit Google Tag Manager setups and reduce measurement errors before launch.
trans-unit.target: 了解 Tag Build 如何協助行銷人員與 SEO 團隊，不必維護複雜的 Google Cloud 基礎設施，也能產生結構化 GTM payload。
Tag Build 目標 | 可靠的 GTM 交付

trans-unit.source: See the product goals behind TagCheck, from reducing GTM setup risk to improving validation and handoff quality.
trans-unit.target: 檢視 Tag Build 如何降低追蹤複雜度、改善 GTM 交付，並把建置工作與驗證流程串接起來。
Tag Build App | GTM JSON 編輯器

trans-unit.source: Open the interactive TagCheck workspace for GTM validation, report review, and implementation support.
trans-unit.target: 開啟 client-side Tag Build 編輯器，為 GA4 事件實作準備可交付給 GTM 的 JSON payload。

trans-unit.source: Read the guide in the TagCheck product documentation for GTM validation, workflows, and implementation details.
trans-unit.target: 閱讀 TagCheck 產品文件中的「」指南，了解 GTM 驗證、工作流程與實作細節。

trans-unit.source: Tag Build is an innovative tool designed specifically for digital marketers and SEO professionals. It streamlines the process of generating JSON files for Google Tag Manager (GTM), following GA4's recommended event structure to ensure optimal tracking implementation.
trans-unit.target: Tag Build 是一款專為數位行銷人員和 SEO 專業人士設計的創新工具。它簡化了為 Google Tag Manager (GTM) 生成 JSON 檔案的流程，遵循 GA4 建議的事件結構，確保最佳的追蹤實施。

trans-unit.source: While Google Tag Manager offers basic functionality for implementing GA4 events, the rapidly evolving nature of business and marketing requirements often necessitates frequent updates and validation. Tag Build addresses these challenges by providing a more efficient and maintainable solution.
trans-unit.target: 雖然Google Tag Manager提供了實施GA4事件的基本功能，但業務和營銷需求的快速發展往往需要頻繁的更新和驗證。Tag Build通過提供更高效和可維護的解決方案來應對這些挑戰。

trans-unit.source: Traditional implementation methods using Google Cloud Platform (GCP) servers can synchronize Google Sheets with GTM effectively. However, many marketing agencies lack access to GCP resources, creating a need for a more accessible solution. Tag Build bridges this gap by providing a standalone tool that doesn't require complex infrastructure.
trans-unit.target: 使用Google Cloud Platform (GCP) 伺服器的傳統實施方法可以有效地將Google Sheets與GTM同步。然而，許多行銷代理商缺乏GCP資源的使用權限，因此需要一個更容易取得的解決方案。Tag Build通過提供一個不需要複雜基礎設施的獨立工具來彌補這個差距。

trans-unit.source: Tag Build is ideal for marketing professionals who want to streamline their workflow and focus more on data analytics and business intelligence. It's particularly valuable for teams looking to optimize their tracking implementation while maintaining efficiency.
trans-unit.target: Tag Build 特別適合想要簡化工作流程並更專注於數據分析和商業智能的行銷專業人員。對於希望在保持效率的同時優化其追蹤實施的團隊來說，這是一個特別有價值的工具。

trans-unit.source: Explore the seamless integration between GA4 recommended events and Tag Build's structured format:
trans-unit.target: 探索 GA4 推薦事件與 Tag Build 結構化格式之間的無縫整合：

trans-unit.source: Google Tag has a default name, but you can change it. You can use an existing measurement ID or leave it empty with default placeholder value
trans-unit.target: Google 標籤具有預設名稱，但您可以更改它。您可以使用現有的測量 ID 或保留空白使用預設預留位置值
電子商務數據和事件設定變數

trans-unit.source: Ecommerce data source is data layer by default
trans-unit.target: 電子商務數據來源預設為數據層

trans-unit.source: Tag Build aims to save users' time and increase their productivity by automating the GTM (Google Tag Manager) configuration process. This is especially beneficial for digital marketers, web developers, and SEO experts who need to manage and track multiple website tags, enabling them to focus more on data analysis rather than tag implementations.
trans-unit.target: Tag Build 旨在透過自動化 GTM（Google 標籤管理工具）配置流程來節省用戶時間並提高其工作效率。這對於需要管理和追蹤多個網站標籤的數位行銷人員、網頁開發人員和 SEO 專家特別有益，使他們能夠更專注於數據分析而非標籤實施。

trans-unit.source: The expected input is an array of objects:

Note that the dollar sign "$" is intended to refer to variables that can be referenced in the document or specifications. You can replace the "$variable_name" placeholders with actual values, or leave them empty.
trans-unit.target: 請注意，美元符號「$」用於參考文件或規格中的變數。您可以用實際值替換「$變數名稱」預留位置，或將其留空。

trans-unit.source: Send Ecommerce Data and Event Settings Variable
trans-unit.target: 發送電子商務數據和事件設定變數

trans-unit.source: By clicking the Send Ecommerce Data The system will remove defined e-commrece event parameters for each tag and perform data collection via the data layer.
trans-unit.target: 點擊發送電子商務數據後，系統將移除每個標籤已定義的電子商務事件參數，並透過數據層進行數據收集。

trans-unit.source: By clicking the Add Event Settings Variable, there will an editor for configuration.
trans-unit.target: 點擊新增事件設定變數後，將會出現配置編輯器。

trans-unit.source: GTM JSON builder for marketing teams
trans-unit.target: 行銷團隊的 GTM JSON 建構器

trans-unit.source: Build cleaner GA4 tag payloads without spreadsheet glue or server setup.
trans-unit.target: 不靠試算表膠水或伺服器設定，也能建立更乾淨的 GA4 tag payload。

trans-unit.source: Tag Build turns event requirements into Google Tag Manager-ready JSON so SEO specialists and digital marketers can move faster with fewer implementation mistakes.
trans-unit.target: Tag Build 將事件需求轉成可直接交給 Google Tag Manager 的 JSON，讓 SEO 專家與數位行銷人員更快交付、少踩實作錯誤。

trans-unit.source: From campaign brief to GTM-ready JSON in three calm steps.
trans-unit.target: 從 campaign brief 到 GTM-ready JSON，只要三個穩定步驟。

trans-unit.source: Keep the thinking in plain marketing language, then let the builder format the payload for implementation and review.
trans-unit.target: 讓思考維持在清楚的行銷語言，再由建構器把 payload 整理成適合實作與審閱的格式。

trans-unit.source: Start with the event name, commerce fields, and tracking variables your team already uses.
trans-unit.target: 從團隊已經在使用的事件名稱、商務欄位與追蹤變數開始。

trans-unit.source: Match GA4's recommended event structure while keeping campaign-specific fields visible.
trans-unit.target: 對齊 GA4 推薦事件結構，同時保留 campaign-specific 欄位的可見性。

trans-unit.source: Copy structured JSON that is easier to review, hand off, and validate inside GTM.
trans-unit.target: 複製更容易審閱、交接並在 GTM 中驗證的結構化 JSON。

trans-unit.source: Less ceremony, more trustworthy tag work.
trans-unit.target: 少一點流程儀式，多一點可信賴的標籤工作。
為 SEO 交付而設計

trans-unit.source: Turn analytics requirements into implementation-ready JSON without asking every stakeholder to learn GTM internals.
trans-unit.target: 將 analytics 需求轉成可實作的 JSON，不需要每位利害關係人都學會 GTM 內部細節。
沒有 GCP 也能使用

trans-unit.source: Teams that cannot run Google Cloud sync jobs still get a structured, repeatable build flow.
trans-unit.target: 即使團隊無法運行 Google Cloud 同步作業，仍能取得結構化、可重複的建置流程。

trans-unit.source: The same data shape supports future validation work in Tag Check, so build and QA stay connected.
trans-unit.target: 同一份資料結構可支援未來 Tag Check 驗證工作，讓 build 與 QA 保持連動。

trans-unit.source: Learn the system before opening the editor.
trans-unit.target: 開啟編輯器之前，先理解系統。

trans-unit.source: Review the architecture and objectives if you need a lightweight brief for teammates before creating payloads.
trans-unit.target: 如果需要在建立 payload 前給隊友一份輕量 brief，可以先檢視架構與目標。
閱讀 Tag Build 介紹

trans-unit.source: Diagram showing the Tag Check System architecture and workflow
trans-unit.target: 展示標籤檢查系統架構和工作流程的圖表

trans-unit.source: The GTM Tag Build provides a user-friendly interface for digital marketers and SEO experts to generate JSON files for Google Tag Manager. This tool streamlines tag management by:
trans-unit.target: GTM 標籤建構工具為數位行銷人員和 SEO 專家提供了一個友善的介面，用於生成 Google Tag Manager 的 JSON 檔案。此工具透過以下方式簡化標籤管理：

trans-unit.source: Enabling effortless creation of accurate JSON files
trans-unit.target: 輕鬆建立準確的 JSON 檔案
確保無錯誤的標籤管理

trans-unit.source: While maintaining the core objective of simplifying tag management, our primary focus is on validation capabilities. Key validation aspects include:
trans-unit.target: 在維持簡化標籤管理這個核心目標的同時，我們主要關注驗證功能。關鍵的驗證方面包括：
驗證前端標籤實施的正確性

trans-unit.source: Providing effective validation in fast-paced business environments
trans-unit.target: 在快節奏的商業環境中提供有效的驗證

trans-unit.source: To address these needs, our team has been devoting to the
trans-unit.target: 為了解決這些需求，我們的團隊一直致力於
訪問 Tag Check 儲存庫

trans-unit.source: system, which utilizes the same data structures as the GTM Tag Build. This integrated approach helps users validate and verify tag functionality with confidence.
trans-unit.target: 系統，該系統使用與 GTM Tag Build 相同的數據結構。這種整合方法幫助用戶能夠自信地驗證和確認標籤功能。

trans-unit.source: Tag Build workflow: GA4 Events and GTM Docs feed into Specification and TagBuild to produce GTM output
trans-unit.target: Tag Build 工作流程：GA4 事件與 GTM 文件流入規範與 TagBuild，產出 GTM 輸出

trans-unit.source: Tag Check workflow: TagBuild outputs GTM JSON that runs on the website; TagCheck monitors GTM and the website against the Specification to surface issues
trans-unit.target: Tag Check 工作流程：TagBuild 輸出運行於網站的 GTM JSON；TagCheck 依規範監測 GTM 與網站並回報問題
圖1 — Tag Build 工作流程
圖2 — Tag Check 工作流程
